name: Penguin Fling

notes.en: Drag back from the penguin like a slingshot, then release to launch. Keyboard alternative: hold Space to charge power, Up/Down to set angle, release Space to launch.
notes.ru: Тяни пингвина назад, как рогатку, и отпускай для запуска. Клавиатура: держи Space для набора силы, стрелки Вверх/Вниз — угол, отпусти Space для запуска.

notes: Real projectile-motion flight (gravity + per-attempt random wind) with angular velocity for visible tumble, then a coefficient-of-restitution bounce phase (each skip shorter than the last) that hands off into a low-friction exponential-decay slide phase once vertical energy dies down — see client/physics.js, kept pure/DOM-free so it's directly steppable from a test harness. A gentle procedural terrain (small bumps + one ramp zone whose rendered geometry IS its collision geometry) adds variety; the ramp can convert slide speed into a genuine secondary arc. Four distance-marker flags award bonus points if the final resting position lands in their zone. No bundled image or audio assets: the whole cartoon winter scene (yeti, penguin, ice, flags) is Canvas 2D paths/gradients, and sound reuses games/_shared/js/ogh-sfx.js (extended with thwack/boing/whoosh/land patterns in the same oscillator-sweep style as its existing 'screech'). Best distance persists via OGHProfile, same convention as games/pop-the-bugs.
